holdings.infoBox: DWX is an equity ETF with a total of 119 individual holdings. The top holdings are TotalEnergies SE stock at 2.71%, Evonik Industries AG at 1.99%, DCC plc at 1.95%, Pembina Pipeline at 1.93%, and Orange at 1.91%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P International Dividend ETF (DWX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of the 100-highest-yielding companies outside the US that meet the S&P's investability and stability screens. DWX was launched on Feb 12, 2008 and is issued by State Street.
